compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The registry identifies P1, P2, P3, and P4. Visual evidence confirms only the presence of soil-filled containers. No active vegetative biomass (leaves/stems) is visible in any pot. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is present in the foreground pot (P3/P4 cluster).

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. No signs of succulent growth.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty. No signs of mint foliage.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit figurine; no Pothos foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: Empty. No Silver Guest foliage detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, appears damp/saturated across all pots.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Introduction of a metallic spoon in the yellow pot (P1) and a white cylindrical object (likely a sensor or tube) in the P3/P4 area. Surface debris is minimal.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t3: Initial state shows bare soil. No vegetative growth observed.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Introduction of a metallic spoon into the yellow pot (P1).
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Lighting variance; no change in biological status.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (sensor/probe) near the P3/P4 cluster.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: The biome is currently devoid of living plant specimens. The environment is being utilized for non-botanical instrumentation (sensors/probes).

anomalies: White cylindrical sensor/probe in P3/P4 area
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the registered botanical specimens. The pots serve as containers for soil and technical equipment (spoon, sensor) rather than living plants. The environment appears to be in a state of experimental monitoring or preparation rather than active cultivation.
